title: ciconium zonale
intro: Ciconium zonale, also known as Henbit or Purple Deadnettle, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family that grows as a weed in many parts of the world. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ciconium zonale include its ability to help reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption, or applied topically as a salve or poultice to aid in wound healing and skin conditions.
